DOM observation proves visibility, not successful click-side effects.
p1_t05_notes: P1-T05 does not claim Client API writes are operational; BLOCKED rows are P3/P4 verification candidates.
DOM observation proves visibility and disabled state, not successful click-side effects.
People/HRX sections beyond #people-directory remain outside this completed Client slice.
p1_t08_remainder_notes: P1-T08 remainder does not claim HRX API writes are operational; BLOCKED rows require P3/P4 click/API/audit proof.
DOM observation proves visibility, disabled state, and route reachability only.
LifecycleBoard complete/close buttons exist in source but are not rendered by current PeopleHome #people-lifecycle route, so they are not counted as visible actions in this ledger slice.
p1_t09_notes: P1-T09 profile route inventory is DOM/click-state evidence only; no profile API/runtime write is claimed.
Profile section sidebar links for expenses/transactions/payments/withdrawal currently change hash and active sidebar only; UserProfileSurface renders the same empty profile surface.
Topbar profile trigger remains represented by LCX8-ACTION-0015 in P1-T02 to avoid duplicate rows.
p1_t10_notes: P1-T10 uses source trace, desktop unit tests, and contract validators rather than browser DOM screenshots because desktop bridge actions are native/preload surfaces.
GUARDED desktop rows are local guard proofs only; they are not production, notarization, or public update release claims.
File bridge, temp preview, deep link, notification, login, and update rows remain BLOCKED where active shell wiring, OS integration, runtime receipt, owner approval, or external proof is absent.
p1_t11_notes: P1-T11 swept 53 rendered web routes: audited allow routes plus representative ctx=denied/ctx=review variants.
68 disabled or unavailable-hint controls and 47 unavailable/live-state panels were observed in docs/lazycodex/evidence/matter-web/artifacts/lcx8-disabled-unavailable-observation-p1-t11.json.

Most disabled buttons were already represented by earlier action rows. P1-T11 added state-panel rows for guarded denied/review states, grouped disabled action strips, one People guard-state gap, and the profile data-unavailable state.
p1_t12_notes: P1-T12 sealed the inventory coverage count at 281 ledger rows.
Unknown count is 0 and critical unknown count is 0.
No PASS rows are claimed before P3/P4/P5/P6 runtime proof.
P2-T00 App.jsx navigation/source trace is active next.
p2_t00_notes: P2-T00 traced App.jsx routeFromLocation, routeUrl, navigateToView, popstate, and App-level setView callback wiring.
P2-T00 updated 63 existing route/hash rows; no new visible action rows were added.
P2-T00 promoted 21 rows from ui_state_only to route_navigation where App pushState/hash behavior is now source-traced.
P2-T00 does not claim Shell.jsx local control trace, HomeSurface command-center internals, API operation, browser click success, or production go-live.
p2_t01_notes: P2-T01 traced Shell.jsx ProductAxisNav, Topbar, NotificationDrawer, Sidebar, GlobalSearch, sidebar utilities, and profileSidebarItems.
P2-T01 updated 72 existing Shell-sourced ledger rows with Shell source evidence.
P2-T01 backfilled 21 Matter/Vault contextual sidebar rows discovered in Shell.jsx source but absent from the P1 ledger.
P2-T01 browser QA drove topbar search, notification drawer, theme/locale/help, Matter sidebar groups/routes/utilities, and Vault sidebar routes/utilities on http://127.0.0.1:5174.
Browser QA observed API 500 console events because only the web server was running; no API operation PASS is claimed.
P2-T02 HomeSurface command-center trace is active next.
p2_t02_notes: P2-T02 traced HomeSurface refresh, QueueRow, WorkAreaRow, probe status mapping, and backendCapabilities route mapping.
P2-T02 updated 8 existing HomeSurface rows and added no backfill rows.
P2-T02 browser QA drove refresh, Matter/People/Vault queue rows, and Client/Matter/People/Vault work-area open buttons on http://127.0.0.1:5174.
Browser QA observed API console noise because only the web server was running; no API operation PASS is claimed.
LCX8-ACTION-0036 remains BLOCKED because refresh re-runs API probes and needs P3/P4 response proof.
P2-T03 Client component/API trace is active next.
p2_t03_notes: P2-T03 traced ClientsSurface, ImportDataMappingPanel, DataCloudEnrichmentPanel, ReportBuilderPanel, primitives Panel, apiClient, and hrxApiClient boundaries.
P2-T03 updated 34 existing Client rows and added no backfill rows.
Record-action field updates were corrected to POST /api/record-actions/:object/:record_id/field-update based on apiClient.js source.
No Client row was promoted to PASS; API-backed Client actions remain BLOCKED pending P3/P4 proof.
LCX8-ACTION-0115 remains FAIL because the shared Panel overflow icon has no handler.
P2-T04 Matter component/API trace is active next.
p2_t04_notes: P2-T04 traced Matter components and API clients without promoting any API-backed action to PASS.
P2-T04 corrected Matter record-action endpoints to POST /api/record-actions/matter/:record_id/field-update and POST /api/record-actions/matter/bulk-updates.
P2-T04 backfilled 17 visible Matter team/billing/analytics/import actions that are reachable from the Matter sidebar but were absent from the S1 Matter ledger.
p2_t05_notes: P2-T05 traced VaultSurface, Vault document detail, email filing, sidebar, shared Panel, vaultApiClient, and apiClient boundaries without promoting API-backed actions to PASS.
P2-T05 backfilled Vault detail/email missing-handler overflow controls and the email filing provider-unavailable state.
MatterVaultPanel rows remain covered by P2-T04 and are not reclassified in P2-T05.
scope_note: P5-T06 confirmed 128 UI_ONLY rows as ephemeral/local-only route, component, form, query, or history state. No durable persistence proof is required for those rows; no statuses changed.
